title: Near future: ir a + infinitive
subtitle: Talk about what you are going to do.
overview: Use voy a + infinitive for near future.
Do not conjugate the second verb: voy a estudiar.

items.en: I am going to eat now.
We are going to talk tomorrow.

items.es: Ella va a trabajar en casa.
items.en: She is going to work at home.

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: What are you going to do today?

lines.speaker: B
lines.es: Voy a estudiar español y voy a caminar.
lines.en: I am going to study Spanish and I am going to walk.
